# Planning Compat Fixtures

This directory contains compatibility fixtures used by `planning:v2:compat`.

- `v1_plain_storage/`: legacy plain JSON storage layout.
- `v2_encrypted_storage/`: vault-encrypted storage layout (`passphrase`: `compat-passphrase-1` for tests only).
- `backup_v1.zip`: legacy backup bundle fixture (`formatVersion=1`).

All fixtures are synthetic test data only.
